title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Rising Conflict
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Perona, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #6, Brook as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Perona, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #6, Brook, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: The parts to fix my rudder.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: I soon followed the same fate, but...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The person whose shadow was taken fell,

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: All of a sudden started moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's the same for your shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: to make the living corpses even stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: From cemeteries all over the world.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You can create a stronger zombie soldier.
